task_completion.description: Create a fiducial list named 'AnatomicalLandmarks' and label the Liver, Spleen, Right Kidney, and Left Kidney.
task_completion.visual_evidence: In the Markups module or 3D/slice views, a fiducial list named 'AnatomicalLandmarks' is visible, containing individual control points explicitly labeled 'Liver', 'Spleen', 'Right Kidney', and 'Left Kidney'.

task_completion.description: Label the remaining required structures: Aorta, IVC, Pancreas, and either Portal Vein or Gallbladder.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The 'AnatomicalLandmarks' list contains additional control points labeled 'Aorta', 'IVC', 'Pancreas', and an eighth point labeled either 'Portal Vein' or 'Gallbladder'.

task_completion.description: Ensure the fiducial points are accurately placed on the corresponding anatomical structures.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The crosshairs or fiducial markers in the axial, coronal, and sagittal slice views visually align with the correct anatomical organs/vessels they are labeled as.

task_completion.description: Export the fiducials to anatomical_landmarks.mrk.json and save the Slicer scene to the AMOS directory.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The Slicer 'Save Data' dialog or a file explorer window shows 'anatomical_landmarks.mrk.json' and a Slicer scene file (.mrml or .mrb) being saved to the '~/Documents/SlicerData/AMOS/' directory.

task_completion.description: Save an axial screenshot named briefing_axial.png.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The Screen Capture module, Save dialog, or file explorer shows a file named 'briefing_axial.png' being saved to the '~/Documents/SlicerData/AMOS/' directory.

task_completion.description: Save a coronal screenshot named briefing_coronal.png.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The Screen Capture module, Save dialog, or file explorer shows a file named 'briefing_coronal.png' being saved to the '~/Documents/SlicerData/AMOS/' directory.

task_completion.description: Save a sagittal screenshot named briefing_sagittal.png.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The Screen Capture module, Save dialog, or file explorer shows a file named 'briefing_sagittal.png' being saved to the '~/Documents/SlicerData/AMOS/' directory.

integrity.description: Verify the agent used the 3D Slicer GUI to place markups.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots should show interaction with the Slicer Markups module and slice views, rather than a terminal window generating a mock JSON file.

integrity.description: Verify the screenshots were generated from the actual Slicer application.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots should show the Slicer Screen Capture module or native save dialogs being used, rather than downloading or moving pre-existing images from the web or other directories.

integrity.description: Verify the agent interacted with the file system or Slicer's Save dialog to save the required files.
integrity.visual_evidence: The Slicer 'Save Data' window or a genuine OS file explorer should be visible showing the target directory, rather than just typing file paths into a text editor.
